name: json-table-x
description: Render arbitrary JSON into nested HTML tables with layout, i18n and styling options.

scripts.build: npm run build:prep && terser json-table-x.js -c --mangle -o dist/json-table-x.min.js && node scripts/copy-dist.js && node scripts/build-css.js
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,open "sh -c 'npm run build && http-server demo -p 8000 -c-1'" "sleep 1 && echo 'Open: http://127.0.0.1:8000/' && open http://127.0.0.1:8000/"
